spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Spatial Computing Canvas, Infinity Canvas

buttons.primary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.glowing: bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-300 border border-cyan-500/50 hover:bg-cyan-500/30 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(34,211,238,0.4)] rounded-full px-8 py-4

motion.background_blobs: Use Framer Motion to create slow-moving, large, highly blurred div circles (blur-3xl, opacity-20) in cyan, fuchsia, and acid green floating behind the main content to simulate a spatial fluid environment.

hero_background.description: Abstract blue liquid flowing. Use as full page background image with 10-20% opacity and heavy blur for spatial computing feel.

secondary_background.description: Abstract purple fluid. Mix with the blue liquid for organic gradients.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the app using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion for the UI.
Font Implementation: Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text from Google Fonts.

Word Interactivity: For the paper reading view, tokenize the text into words. Wrap every word in a <span> (or motion.span) applying the 'interactive_word' styles. When clicked, it should trigger the AI side panel and pass the word and its surrounding sentence context.

Side Panel UI: The contextual explanation panel must slide in from the right using the 'panel_slide' motion settings. It must use the 'glass_panel' component styles to overlay gracefully over the background, heavily blurring what's behind it (Apple visionOS 2050 style).

Background Aesthetic: Implement 'Jony Ive on acid 2050' by using the provided image_urls as a deeply blurred, dark background layer, layered with slow-moving Framer Motion gradient blobs (cyan/fuchsia/acid green) to create a 'living' environment.

Form Elements & Modals: Use Shadcn UI for standard functionality like the PDF Dropzone, but heavily customize them. Strip out any generic Vercel/Stripe styles and replace them with the 'Crystal Glass' aesthetic (transparent backgrounds, 1px white/10 borders, heavy backdrop blurs).
Caching System: Implement the frontend logic to cache AI responses by a hash of (word + context) so redundant API calls are never made.
Testing: CRITICAL: Ensure all interactive elements (words, buttons, dropzones, close panel buttons) have 'data-testid' attributes for robust automated testing.
